issue_title: Nested `caplog.filtering` usage may remove filters early
issue_text:
- [x] a detailed description of the bug or problem you are having
- [ ] ~output of `pip list` from the virtual environment you are using~ (N/A, design bug)
- [ ] ~pytest and operating system versions~ (N/A, design bug)
- [x] minimal example if possible

I had a baffling case where a caplog filter set up by a yield fixture with `caplog.filtering` was gone by the time the test case using the fixture was executed. I eventually traced the problem down to a separate non-yielding fixture that used `ca
success_criteria: 嵌套使用相同 filter 的 caplog 过滤上下文时，不应提前移除外层 filter；离开内层上下文后过滤仍应生效；离开最外层后再恢复原状；回归测试全部通过。
